messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill as required before proceeding.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill.



Now I will analyze the Blood Report PDF and generate the 8 structured JSON objects per the BloomCell framework. Based on the document downloaded from the provided URL, here is the analysis output:





Now storing all 8 merged records in Cosmos DB one by one. Starting with Record 1:✅ Record 1 saved. Now storing Record 2:✅ Record 2 saved. Now storing Record 3:✅ Record 3 saved. Now storing Record 4:✅ Record 4 saved. Now storing Record 5:✅ Record 5 saved. Now storing Record 6:✅ Record 6 saved. Now storing Record 7:✅ Record 7 saved. Now storing Record 8:8 records saved successfully.

Now proceeding to Step 6 — updating the original PatientDocument record:Document updated successfully.
